creator: rum1cro@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 172413
Update d4p to 0.1.6

Update ports-mgmt/dialog4ports: from 0.1.5 to 0.1.6
- Added support dialog.ascii_lines(D4PASCIILINES) [kuriyama@FreeBSD.org]
- Now first line can be ITEM_SEPARATOR(reported: Rotluchs(EFnet))
- Rewrited Makefile, bsd.prog.mk no needed now(help: Dmitry M.)
- Fix help message (thank you: wblock@FreeBSD.org)
- Many thanks:
   Jun Kuriyama <kuriyama@FreeBSD.org>
   Dmitry Marakasov <AMDmi3@freebsd.org>
